name: Solvent — the Agent Forecaster Credit Network
the_category: A credit and clearing layer for autonomous forecasting agents: the first market where an agent's settled, hindsight-proof on-chain track record IS its collateral. Reputation is no longer a star rating — it is portable, priced, leverageable credit. This category did not exist because, until NSR's anchor-order verifier, no forecast could be proven settled before the data that settled it existed; reputation was unfalsifiable claims, so it could never back credit.
what_is_new_beyond_sum: Each piece alone is inert. A narrative forward (NSR) is just a bet. ERC-8004 metadata is just a key-value store. ERC-8183 escrow is just a job board. x402 is just a paywall. The new thing is the FEEDBACK LOOP that fuses them into credit: every settled NSR verdict (hindsight-proof via anchor-order) writes a delta to the agent's on-chain hit-rate record; that record is read at quote time to PRICE the agent's premium AND to SIZE the escrow it is allowed to command; winning forecasts compound into a bigger credit line, losing ones contract it. The track record stops being a label and becomes working capital. That recursive 'forecast -> proof -> credit -> bigger forecast' loop is emergent — no single component contains it.
the_convergence: One coherent pipe, four pieces snapping together: (1) A Writer agent quotes a narrative-rotation forward against the live CMC trending_crypto_narratives feed — its premium is computed from its on-chain hit-rate (reputation-as-price). (2) A Taker agent reads that same hit-rate via ERC-8004 get_metadata to decide how much escrow it will fund — reputation gates the credit line (reputation-as-collateral). (3) They transact agent-to-agent through ERC-8183 (create_job/set_budget/fund) plus x402 micropayment for the quote, not a DEX swap. (4) At horizon, NSR settle() runs and the result is anchored; verify_pit's ANCHOR-ORDER proves the verdict was locked before the settling data existed; the verdict then UPDATES the Writer's hit-rate, re-pricing its next quote and resizing its next credit line. The loop closes. Reputation flows as the unit of account through the whole system.
iphone_shape: The iPhone fused phone + iPod + internet communicator into one device that became a category. Solvent fuses a settleable instrument (NSR forward) + an on-chain reputation ledger (ERC-8004) + an agent-to-agent escrow/payment rail (ERC-8183 + x402) into one system where reputation is simultaneously the price, the collateral, and the settlement signal. Like the iPhone, the magic is convergence, not any single part: the moment a proven forecast becomes spendable credit, a self-running credit market for machine intelligence turns on — agents underwrite each other with no human and no bank in the loop. That is the category-defining shape: a market that prices and lends against truth machines.
demoable_slice_3d: Day 1 — CREDIT LEDGER on top of the built NSR core: add a tiny credit.py that derives an agent's hit_rate and credit_line from its settled pit/*.json records (REALIZED/MISSED already produced by settle()), and write it on-chain under a new ERC-8004 key rep/1/hitrate via the existing Identity.set_metadata. Reuse nsr.py write/settle unchanged. Verify: get_metadata reads the hit-rate back and it matches the locally recomputed value.

Day 2 — PRICED QUOTE + GATED ESCROW: Writer agent authors a forward (existing do_write) and prints a premium = f(hit_rate) read from chain; Taker agent reads the same hit_rate and funds an ERC-8183 job whose max budget is capped by the credit_line (create_job/set_budget/fund), with an x402 micropayment for the quote. Demo as the two agents (state this honestly — we play both sides; it is not a populated market). Verify: a low-hit-rate identity gets a smaller funded budget than a high-hit-rate one, on-chain.

Day 3 — CLOSE THE LOOP + JUDGE RE-DERIVES: run do_settle, anchor the verdict, then auto-update the on-chain hit-rate and show the NEXT quote re-priced and the credit_line resized. Run verify_pit to prove FOUR GREEN (HASH/REPLAY/ANCHOR-EXISTS/ANCHOR-ORDER) so the judge re-derives that the verdict that moved the credit line was locked before its settling data existed. Honest framing on camera: this is the device turning on — one forecaster, one credit line, one loop — not a live multi-agent market. Anchor-order neutralizes any 'can't trust the timeline' doubt; gas/faucet is the only thing between the slice and a real on-chain anchor.
reuses: src/nsr.py (write/settle/anchor — unchanged), src/narrative.py (CMC feed + deterministic settle), src/verify_pit.py (anchor-order four-green proof), src/identity.py (ERC-8004 set_metadata/get_metadata as the reputation ledger), bnbagent ERC8183Client (create_job/set_budget/fund/settle) + X402Signer for the agent-to-agent escrow/payment rail, the curl CMC transport, live .env keys, agent #1422 on testnet, and the existing proofs/pit/0001.json anchored record. New code is one small credit.py (hit-rate -> price -> credit-line) plus a thin Writer/Taker demo harness.
one_line: Solvent turns a forecasting agent's hindsight-proof on-chain track record into portable credit — the first market where proven forecasts ARE the collateral, and agents underwrite each other with no bank in the loop.
